story.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
story.summary: A girl is among at least eight killed in Ukraine's capital in massive Russian drone and missile attacks, officials say.
story.selection_reason: The story about Ukraine rescuers pulling dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes has significant global implications due to the ongoing conflict between Ukraine and Russia.
